description_long: This object appears as a highly abstracted and distorted representation of a human adult, with elongated, angular limbs and sharp, spindly extensions radiating outward. The form is fragmented, with thin, spike-like projections and irregular, intersecting planes that suggest a dynamic, almost explosive motion. The main body mass is loosely defined, with some areas resembling a torso and bent legs, while other sections dissolve into thin, ribbon-like structures. The surface is predominantly smooth, with a mix of metallic brown and muted blue-gray tones, giving it a surreal, almost sculptural quality. There are no discernible facial features, hands, or feet, and the overall silhouette is jagged and non-anthropomorphic. The object gives the impression of a digital glitch or a deconstructed figure in motion, rather than a realistic pedestrian.
description: A highly abstract, fragmented adult figure with elongated, spiky limbs and intersecting planes in metallic brown and blue-gray. The form is jagged, dynamic, and non-anthropomorphic, resembling a digital glitch or deconstructed sculpture.
description_view_0: From this angle, the spiky, angular extensions are most prominent, with the main body mass partially visible and intersected by thin, sharp projections.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the elongated, horizontal extensions and the thin, ribbon-like structures, with less visible body mass and more focus on the abstract, linear elements.
description_view_2: Here, the intersecting planes and spindly projections dominate, with the main form appearing flattened and the blue-gray areas more visible among the brown spikes.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the fragmented body mass and the dynamic, jagged silhouette, with both brown and blue-gray surfaces visible and the spiky extensions radiating outward.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted, unrecognizable clothing or body form with no discernible garments
attribute_posture: dynamic, fragmented pose with limbs extended and body twisted
attribute_footwear_type: unidentifiable or absent due to abstraction
attribute_hairstyle: unidentifiable or absent due to abstraction
